violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Tape used to repair damaged handle to reach in freezer in kitchen

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Kitchen areas around line cooking equipment have build-up of grease/dust and are in need of cleaning.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood and filters have build-up of grease/dust. In need of cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors in walk in cooler, kitchen, basement storage, and pizza prep/dish area need cleaning. Walls and ceilings discolored and have an excessive build-up of grease and dust.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Floors have damaged/broken tiles in kitchen. Foundation settling has cracked walls/broken seams. Need repairs.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Walk in cooler has old, stained cardboard liner.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. Rusting shelving units in walk in cooler. Interior door panel to walk in cooler rusting and damaged.--Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Tape used to repair damaged handle to reach in freezer in kitchen

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach in coolers need cleaning. Line cooking equipment has build-up of grease. Needs cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Areas around line cooking equipment have build-up of grease/dust and need cleaning.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood and filters have build-up of grease/dust and need cleaning.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Store items off floor in basement storage area. Store items away from unprotected drain lines in basement storage area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors in walk in cooler, kitchen, basement storage, and pizza prep/dish area need cleaning. Walls and ceilings discolored and have an excessive build-up of grease and dust. Need cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Floors have damaged/broken tiles. Foundation settling has cracked walls/broken seams. Need repairs.
